metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4827
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 6, 8: postembedding immunogold labeling of climbing fiber synapses localized protein 4.1N (EPB41L1) to the PSD from E19 until P7, while at later timepoints it was associated with intracellular organelles, the cytoskeleton, and the plasma membrane. Protein 4.1N could also be detected presynaptically.

Figure 7: Protein 4.1N (and SAP97/DLG1) colocalized with GluR1 (GluA1/GRIA1) in Purkinje cells at early ages.

Protein 4.1N (EPB41L1), a neuronal homolog of protein 4.1R, associates with actin cytoskeleton (PMID:10414974, PMID:11604393).. Experimental description: M&M: "postnatal Sprague-Dawley rats were used in these experiments"

antibody:
Rabbit polyclonal anti-4.1N (serum; m4.1N), peptide sequence: N-terminus of mouse 4.1N, source: PMID:10414974

to double-check the identity of the protein with street-name 4.1N; nucleotide BLAST of "CCTCTGTGAAGAGATCCTGG" primer used in northern blot in PMID:10414974 returns NM_001258331 as first hit (gene=EPB41L1)

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
